novel_features.name: hot deals (live RSS, sorted by thumbs)
novel_features.description: Top live frontpage deals filtered by min-thumbs, sorted thumbs DESC.

novel_features.name: fresh frontpage RSS
novel_features.description: Live unfiltered frontpage RSS feed (today's drops).

novel_features.name: client-side live search
novel_features.description: Keyword filter on the live frontpage RSS as a fallback for Slickdeals' broken server-side search.

novel_features.name: category browsing with keyword expansion
novel_features.description: Curated forum-id -> keyword map (tech, gaming, home, grocery, apparel, sports) for client-side filtering of the live frontpage.

novel_features.name: live featured-coupons via Nuxt
novel_features.description: Live featured coupon list with optional --store merchant filter.

novel_features.name: deal watch with optional snapshot persistence
novel_features.description: Fetch a single deal from the live frontpage RSS, optionally persisting a snapshot row for time-series analytics.

novel_features.name: daily digest with merchant cap and grouping
novel_features.description: Summarize the top-N captured snapshots over a window, optionally capped per merchant and grouped by merchant/category.

novel_features.name: compound deal query (store + category + since + min-thumbs)
novel_features.description: Flagship SQL compound query over captured snapshots: --store costco --since 24h --min-thumbs 50.

novel_features.name: top-stores merchant aggregation
novel_features.description: Merchant aggregation over a time window: deal_count, avg_thumbs, max_thumbs, first/last seen.

novel_features.name: thumbs velocity time-series
novel_features.description: Chronological thumb-count observations for a deal with per-step delta — momentum signal for arbitrage and auto-snipe.
